/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/actividadPentagono.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/actividadPentagono.dir/src/actividadPentagono.cpp.o -o actividadPentagono  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
